allow: PowerShell(Test-Path "C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3)
